title: Cryogenic Cold
summary: Extreme cold drains warmth and slows movement.
body: Cryogenic zones are found in polar and high-altitude ruins.
Thermal insulation and heat packs are required.
Without protection, you will freeze rapidly.
steps: Carry heat packs or warming fuel.
Find shelter immediately if hypothermia sets in.
commonMistakes: Exploring cold zones with basic gear.
